## Checklist

- [ ] I exported the pack from Keyflow using `Settings` -> `Cheatsheets` -> `Export`.
- [ ] I selected `JSON`.
- [ ] I selected exactly one app profile.
- [ ] The pack JSON contains one exported Keyflow app profile.
- [ ] `catalog.json` includes or updates the matching entry.
- [ ] Existing pack updates increment the catalog `version`.
- [ ] I tested the pack by importing it in Keyflow.
